use_codes.desc: IN COMBINATION WITH DEXAMETHASONE TO TREAT RELAPSED OR REFRACTORY MULTIPLE MYELOMA (REFACTORY TO AT LEAST 1 PROTEASOME INHIBITOR, 1 IMMUNOMODULATORY AGENT, AND 1 ANTI-CD38 MAB) IN ADULTS WHO RECEIVED AT LEAST 4 PRIOR LINES OF THERAPY
